name: Serabi Gold plc
description: Serabi Gold plc is a multi-asset, high-growth gold producer and developer focused on sustainable mining operations in Brazil. The company’s primary interests include the 100% owned Palito Mining Complex and the Coringa Gold Project, both situated in the Tapajós region of northern Brazil. Serabi Gold is committed to responsible stewardship and best ESG practices, aiming to optimize asset values for all stakeholders while pursuing significant production growth through its extensive exploration portfolio, strategic M&A, and a proven track record of successfully developing and operating mines within the region.
